title: rhododendron maddenii subsp. crassum
intro: Rhododendron maddenii subsp. crassum, also known as the thick-leaved Madden's rhododendron, is a subspecies of flowering plant native to the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron maddenii subsp. crassum include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds. Rhododendron maddenii subsp. crassum is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
